mapper.sql: id, group_code, group_name, group_type, scope, status, priority, description, effective_start_time, effective_end_time, version_no, created_by, updated_by, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM nickname_rule_groups WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM nickname_rule_groups WHERE group_code = #{groupCode} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE nickname_rule_groups SET group_code = #{groupCode}, group_name = #{groupName}, group_type = #{groupType}, scope = #{scope}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, description = #{description}, effective_start_time = #{effectiveStartTime}, effective_end_time = #{effectiveEndTime}, version_no = #{versionNo}, created_by = #{createdBy}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
